LanguageData.Ammo_40mmGrenade_UNSCHEDP.label: 40mm grenade UNSC (HEDP)
LanguageData.Ammo_40mmGrenade_UNSCHEDP.description: Medium velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers. This one features a heat warhead.
LanguageData.Bullet_40mmGrenade_UNSCHEDP.label: 40x46mm grenade (HEDP)
LanguageData.Bullet_40x46mmGrenade_UNSCHE.label: 40x46mm grenade (HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_40x46mmGrenade_UNSCEMP.label: 40x46mm grenade (EMP)
LanguageData.Bullet_40x46mmGrenade_UNSCSmoke.label: 40x46mm grenade (Smoke)
